headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 26, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 17-1 victory. Willson Contreras led the Red Sox offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. The Seattle Mariners rallied to secure an 11-9 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, overcoming a late deficit to secure the win. Nathan Church led the Mariners' offense with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs. The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, affecting their team's roster. The New York Yankees placed right-handed pitcher Angel Chivilli on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder discomfort. The Cincinnati Reds placed third baseman Eugenio Suárez on the 10-day injured list with a mild left oblique strain. The Toronto Blue Jays placed right fielder Nathan Lukes on the 10-day injured list with a left hamstring strain and transferred right-handed pitcher Yimi García from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list. The Chicago Cubs placed left-handed pitcher Caleb Thielbar on the 15-day injured list with a left hamstring strain and transferred right-handed pitcher Porter Hodge from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired catcher Willie MacIver in a trade with the Texas Rangers, who received cash in return. The Seattle Mariners traded right-handed pitcher Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for right-handed pitcher Ty Cummings. The Colorado Rockies traded third baseman Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash. The Houston Astros traded shortstop Braden Shewmake to the New York Yankees for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 17-1 victory. Willson Contreras led the Red Sox offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Come from Behind to Defeat Cardinals 11-9**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners rallied to secure an 11-9 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, overcoming a late deficit to secure the win. Nathan Church led the Mariners' offense with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs. Connor Brogdon earned a strong relief appearance, striking out 2 batters in 1 inning of work.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Marlins in 6-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 6-2 win over the Miami Marlins, with Casey Schmitt leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs. Robbie Ray pitched 5 strong innings for the Marlins, striking out 4 and allowing 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Yankees Place RHP Angel Chivilli on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: New York Yankees right-handed pitcher Angel Chivilli has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder discomfort, effective retroactive to April 23, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Willie MacIver in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have acquired catcher Willie MacIver in a trade with the Texas Rangers, who received cash in return.
